title: A Studio Calico special - 30% Off!
excerpt: For new subscribers, Studio Calico is offering 30% off of the first kit, which would be Spencer's . If you have been thinking of subscribing, this would be a great time! Simply start a subscription using the promo code: AMY30…
body:
For new subscribers, Studio Calico is offering 30% off of the first kit, which would be Spencer's. If you have been thinking of subscribing, this would be a great time!

Simply start a subscription using the promo code: AMY30 - you will love getting these kits delivered each month to your door. Offer expires April 20th at midnight.

PS - Registration is still open for the awesome class, Pop Off the Page 2!
